---
title: Spatial Data Science Summit 2026 Reimbursement Information
---

This page introduces the reimbursement process for attendees of the Spatial Data Science Summit 2026. 
Please read through the following information to ensure a smooth reimbursement experience.

## General Process
You will need to register as a vendor in PaymentWorks, which is the system we use for processing payments and reimbursements. The registration process involves several steps, including receiving an email invitation, completing the registration form, and setting up multi-factor authentication.

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="45%"}
### Step 1: Vendor registration email

Each attendee will receive an email invitation to register as a vendor in PaymentWorks.
:::

::: {.column width="55%"}
![](files/invitation_email.png){width=100% fig-alt="Vendor registration invitation email"}
:::

:::

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="45%"}
### Step 2: Register your account

After completing the registration form, you will receive an activation email and log in again to continue.
:::


::: {.column width="55%"}
![](files/register1.png){width=100% fig-alt="Vendor registration screen"}
:::

:::

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="45%"}
### Step 3: Multi-Factor Authentication

You will be asked to complete multi-factor authentication using your phone number.
:::

::: {.column width="55%"}
![](files/multifactor.png){width=100% fig-alt="Multi-factor authentication screen"}
:::
:::

### Final step: Complete information based on your tax residency (10 min to finish)
Final Step: Complete Registration Based on Your Tax Residency (Approx. 10 Minutes)

Please follow the instructions according to your tax residency status to complete the registration process.
Instructions are available under the Registration - U.S. and Registration - Foreign tabs.

After submission, the SDSU Research Foundation will complete an internal review within five business days. 
Once approved, you will be set up as a vendor and eligible for payment or reimbursement.

After vendor setup and invoice submission:
- Direct deposit payments are issued on Tuesdays and Thursdays.
- Check payments are issued on Thursdays only.


## Required documents:
After you have completed the vendor registration process, please submit the following documents for reimbursement:
- Receipts for transportation/lodging. 
- A filled [Travel reimbursement PDF form](files/Travelreimbursementform.pdf)
**Please Submit them though (Link)**

### Instructions for Completing the Travel Reimbursement Form
Please complete the form with your personal information and travel details.
In general, every receipt must be reflected on the form.
- Per diem: Enter the per diem amount for each day of travel.
- Lodging: You may enter the total lodging amount on the last day, but it is preferable to list the amount for each night separately.
